title: A BIBO-Stable but Asymptotically Unstable System
summary: This page contrasts BIBO stability with internal asymptotic stability and notes that BIBO stability does not necessarily imply internal stability. Example 3.26 shows a cascade of two subsystems, one unstable internally, whose overall impulse response simplifies to (0.5)^n u[n], making the composite system appear BIBO-stable from external measurements.
